proven.claim: Proven: "Commands:" header executes immediately after the first separator —
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2
; LINE: 539
; Proven: "Commands:" header executes immediately after the first separator —
; sequential execution, no conditional between 538 and 539.
(declare-const stmt_538_fired Int)
(declare-const stmt_539_fired Int)
(assert (= stmt_538_fired 1))
(assert (= stmt_539_fired stmt_538_fired))
(assert (not (= stmt_539_fired 1)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — "Commands:" header cannot be skipped
